footer.tagline: Professional kitchen installation\nin the province of Alicante.

meta.title: Kitchen Installation & Design in Alicante
meta.description: Specialists in kitchen installation, renovation and design in Alicante. Over 7 years of experience and 300 completed projects. Free no-obligation quote.
meta.ogTitle: AFV Cocinas — Kitchen Installation & Design in Alicante
meta.ogDescription: Specialists in kitchen installation, renovation and design in Alicante. Over 7 years of experience.

about.text: I have spent over [[highlight]] installing kitchens across the province of Alicante. I work with distributors and directly with homeowners. If you have a project, let's talk.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Have a project? Tell me what you need and I'll give you a no-obligation quote.

meta.title: Our Kitchens — Portfolio
meta.description: Explore our portfolio of kitchens installed in Alicante: modern, rustic, minimalist and island kitchens. Over 300 completed projects.
meta.ogDescription: Explore our portfolio of kitchens installed in Alicante: modern, rustic, minimalist and island kitchens.

hero.heading: Kitchens installed with precision
hero.description: Tailored installations done with skill and care. Neat finishes and practical solutions built to last.

premium.title: Premium Quality
premium.description: We only work with top-of-the-range materials. Every kitchen is built to last decades without losing its original appearance.

function.title: Functionality
function.description: We design the space with your daily use in mind. Ergonomics, layout and practicality are our priority.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.description: No two projects are the same. We adapt every kitchen to your space, your taste and your budget with complete freedom to personalise.

price.title: Competitive Pricing
price.description: By working directly with manufacturers, we cut out middlemen and offer you the best prices on the market.

approach.heading: Care down to the last detail
approach.body: Clean, careful work without rush: we measure, adjust and finish. Solid installations, simple solutions and neat finishes that stand up to daily use.

bottomCta.heading: Can't find what you're looking for?
bottomCta.description: Tell us your idea and we'll make it a reality. We work to measure, with no design limits.

meta.title: Kitchen Gallery
meta.description: Gallery of kitchens installed by AFV Cocinas in the province of Alicante. Over 300 completed projects.
meta.ogDescription: Gallery of kitchens installed by AFV Cocinas in the province of Alicante. Over 300 completed projects.

meta.title: Gallery
